mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings ( room_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, adults, children, total_price, status ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{adults}, #{children}, #{totalPrice}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, check_in_date AS checkInDate, check_out_date AS checkOutDate, adults, children, total_price AS totalPrice, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM bookings WHERE id = #{id}
